name: Moonlight Cocoa
illustration: A shimmering cocoa that glows faintly under moonlight, swirled with silver.

name: Wishing Star Parfait
illustration: A layered parfait of red and blue berries with cream that sparkles like stardust.

name: Dreamer’s Tea
illustration: A fragrant lavender tea that fills the room with a dreamy, calming haze.

name: Aurora Smoothie
illustration: A swirling smoothie of purple and gold that shifts colors like the northern lights.

name: Enchanted Toast
illustration: A golden toast dusted with glittering stardust that hums with faint warmth.
